text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Dozing off, I see an old memory dance through my dreams.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my way home from the amusement park, I find a girl crying
because she got separated from her mom.
choice_data_list: Want me to help you look for her?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Really?! Thanks, big bro! Hehe, you're so nice. ♪

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Really?! Thanks, big sis! Hehe, you're so nice. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her tears dry as we search, and then... as we pass the park's princess
castle, she stops and looks up.
choice_data_list:
...Do you want to be a princess when you grow
up?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I follow the girl's gaze to the castle, the question slips out of my
mouth. In response, she turns around and flashes me a warm, mellow
smile.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Well, my dream is—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's morning, and I arrive in front of the Tracen Academy school gates
to find a huge crowd of people outside waiting for something.

text_block_list.name: Trendy Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
No way—I think we managed to grab the best spot here! We're like
super close!

text_block_list.name: Fangirl Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Waking up early to claim a spot was so worth it! And If I'm lucky,
maybe I can get a selfie...
choice_data_list: Excuse me, but what's going on?

text_block_list.name: Trendy Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Trainer, you're joking, right? Today's the day the famous Umastagrammer known only as "Curren" is transferring to our school!

text_block_list.name: Fangirl Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you really don't know?! We're talking about the selfie goddess
with over 3 million followers on Umastagram—that Curren!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like this new transfer is already well-loved by the student
body. My curiosity piqued, I decide to wait with the crowd for her to
arrive.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Soon enough, a limousine parks in front of the school gate, and a
single girl steps out.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Aiiieeeeek! Curren!

text_block_list.name: Curren?
text_block_list.text: Wow! ♪ What a welcome! Don't tell me you were all waiting for me?

text_block_list.name: Curren?
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you all are just the best!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You just made me the world's happiest Curren Chan! ♪ Heehee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Trendy Umamusume
text_block_list.text: No way! It's like Curren's got filters on her—but in real life!

text_block_list.name: Trendy Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Omigosh—she's positively glowing! The Umastagram star, Curren, is really in front of me right now!

text_block_list.name: Fangirl Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Um, do you mind if I get a picture with you? I'm your b-b-biggest fan!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Not at all! Let's see... Right, this pose will make you extra cute!

text_block_list.name: Fangirl Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, I actually... got a pic with her. Wow! Thank you so much! I'll
treasure this forever!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Curren's happy when everyone's happy! ♪ When you post that pic,
don't forget to spread the love via #CurrenChan!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, there's still plenty of pictures to be taken! ☆ Just remember
sure to share the pics with all your friends, okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Okaaay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What a presence... I find myself staring at the impromptu photoshoot,
lost for words, when suddenly... my eyes meet Curren's.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Y-you're—

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I'm talking to you, silly!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: After all... you and I are meant to be!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You're a trainer at this academy, aren't you? I think... I was destined
to find you here!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: It's decided—I've made up my mind! From today on... you'll be my trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Is... that a no? You know, I've been waiting so long to see you... Sniff,
sniff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her sudden barrage of cuteness nearly sways me, but I return to my
senses. A contract between trainer and Umamusume isn't something to
be taken lightly.
choice_data_list: C-come over here for a sec!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Okaaay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Leaving the school gate behind, I take the time to explain to Curren
Chan about trainers and how she shouldn't pick hers off of a first
impression.
choice_data_list: You came here because you had a dream, right?
You came here because you had a dream, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...A dream, huh?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Well, of course I do! ♪ After all, I came to this school...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...so I could hear everyone tell me how cute I am! ♪ I bet that at the Tracen Academy, I'll get waaay more followers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It feels like someone just hit me over the head with a sledgehammer. That's why she enrolled here?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hear me out, okay? I want even more people to love me, and to do
that—I need you!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So, pleeease... Big Bro! Be my one and only trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So, pleeease... Big Sis! Be my one and only trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Trendy Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...Is that trainer actually trying to turn down Curren? And when she's
asking so earnestly, too...

text_block_list.name: Fangirl Umamusume
text_block_list.text: If I were a trainer, I know I'd jump at an opportunity like this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can feel her fans staring daggers at me right now... I try to come up
with a good reason to turn her down, but somehow...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Then from today on, you're my trainer! We're official! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what did I just agree to?! She had me in the palm of her hand!
I'd better keep my guard up around her in the future...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yay! ♪ Now we'll aaalways be together! Isn't that great, Big Bro? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yay! ♪ Now we'll aaalways be together! Isn't that great, Big Sis? ♪

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Curren!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a round of applause from the nearby onlookers... but not
everyone seems so keen to welcome the new arrival.

text_block_list.name: Serious Umamusume
text_block_list.text: ...What's the deal with that crowd?

text_block_list.name: Race-loving Umamusume
text_block_list.text: An Umastagrammer... I hope she knows the rest of us are here to race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess popularity is a double-edged sword. But at this academy, the
only way to prove the doubters wrong is with your race results.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Big Bro, are you worried about me?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Big Sis, are you worried about me?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks. But it'll be okay—because I'm suuuper cute! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, a physical evaluation is held for Curren Chan.
Surrounded by throngs of curious spectators, she shows off a variety
of skills.

text_block_list.name: Instructor
text_block_list.text: 1,200 meters on dirt! A-at that speed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our surroundings break out in commotion. For a newbie, her time was
exceptional! She might just have a natural talent for sprinting.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Big Brooo! Hey hey, how did I do? I was reeeally cute out there,
right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Big Siiis! Hey hey, how did I do? I was reeeally cute out there,
right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan... Why did she transfer here, and what does she want out
of racing? For now, I hit the follow button on her Umastagram profile.
